experiment_card.research_question: Can the model emit canonical locator candidates directly -- line ranges and character offsets -- so local review can compute quote hashes from the proposed spans instead of reconstructing support after the fact?
experiment_card.hypothesis: On the same approved second-source excerpt and text_judgment_v0 benchmark as pilot 004, a narrowed locator-candidate output contract may reduce reviewer reconstruction work by producing line ranges and character offsets directly, while preserving proposal-only boundaries and leaving quote-hash computation to local review.
experiment_card.evaluation_plan: Validate this proposed ExperimentCard and MethodCard against protocol schemas. After a separately authorized live run, create proposal-only export records and evaluate whether source-linked claims include usable line ranges, character offsets, locator confidence, exact/approximate/broad/missing labels, unsupported-claim handling, and metadata-safe locally computed quote hashes. Method quality, trading validity, product readiness, strategy evidence, graduation, and architecture are not evaluated by this planning packet.
